resolved_gotchas.description: CUDA LD_LIBRARY_PATH not set in subprocess environment
resolved_gotchas.resolution: Source ~/.config/fish/config.fish before transcription; bake CUDA paths into config.fish
resolved_gotchas.prevention: install.fish Step 8 sets CUDA paths automatically

resolved_gotchas.description: LD_LIBRARY_PATH CUDA environment variable missing in fish
resolved_gotchas.resolution: Configured in config.fish alongside G2 fix
resolved_gotchas.prevention: install.fish ensures CUDA paths are persistent

resolved_gotchas.resolution: Inspect actual Firestore data before any schema migration; verify field consistency across all documents
resolved_gotchas.prevention: Always read sample docs before schema changes; validate with dry-run

resolved_gotchas.resolution: Lowercase ALL string values in ALL t_any_* arrays via fix_all_lowercase.py (1,286 entities updated)
resolved_gotchas.prevention: All pipeline ingestion normalizes to lowercase before Firestore write

resolved_gotchas.description: t_any_shows field contained mixed-case values in TripleDB
resolved_gotchas.prevention: Pipeline normalization step lowercases all array string values

resolved_gotchas.description: Detail panel provider not accessible at all viewport sizes
resolved_gotchas.resolution: Ensure DetailPanel NotifierProvider is always in widget tree at all viewport sizes
resolved_gotchas.prevention: Providers must be positioned above all breakpoint-sensitive widgets

resolved_gotchas.description: Widget rebuild triggers event handlers multiple times
resolved_gotchas.resolution: Added deduplication logic and guard flags to prevent handler re-execution
resolved_gotchas.prevention: All event handlers use guard flags or dedup checks

resolved_gotchas.description: Rotating queries feature overwrites user input
resolved_gotchas.resolution: Removed query rotation feature entirely from query_editor.dart
resolved_gotchas.prevention: Feature removal was the fix; do not re-add auto-rotation

resolved_gotchas.description: Query appeared to cap results at 1,000 entities
resolved_gotchas.resolution: Verified no .limit() calls; CA has exactly 1,000 entities - not a cap
resolved_gotchas.prevention: Updated feedback message to remove misleading 'first 1,000 results' text

resolved_gotchas.description: TripleDB results displaying show names in title case
resolved_gotchas.resolution: Data fix via fix_tripledb_shows_case.py (same as G37)
resolved_gotchas.prevention: Pipeline normalization ensures lowercase on ingestion

resolved_gotchas.description: Parser regex order regression - unquoted matched before quoted values
resolved_gotchas.resolution: Redeployed with correct quoted-first regex order; added 3 regression tests
resolved_gotchas.prevention: Regression tests for quoted value parsing; verify deploy matches repo code

resolved_gotchas.description: Qwen3.5-9B returns empty responses - tokens consumed by internal thinking
resolved_gotchas.resolution: Add think:false to Ollama API payload via ollama_config.py
resolved_gotchas.prevention: All Ollama calls go through ollama_config.py merge_defaults() which sets think:false

resolved_gotchas.description: Firecrawl MCP server not loading despite API key being set
resolved_gotchas.resolution: Transient npx startup delay; resolved by v9.37 with confirmed operational test
resolved_gotchas.prevention: Verify MCP servers load on session start; retry if transient failure

resolved_gotchas.resolution: Patched 7 open-interpreter files with try/except ImportError guards around pkg_resources
resolved_gotchas.prevention: Pin open-interpreter; monitor for upstream fix; install.fish includes patches

resolved_gotchas.description: query_rag.py CLI --json flag parsed as positional argument
resolved_gotchas.resolution: Bypassed CLI; use direct import of query_rag functions in telegram_bot.py
resolved_gotchas.prevention: Prefer direct Python imports over subprocess CLI calls for internal tools

resolved_gotchas.description: Firestore composite index required for rating sort + filter combo
resolved_gotchas.resolution: Python-side sort in firestore_query.py - fetch all matching docs, sort by nested field in Python, apply limit. Avoids composite index dependency entirely.
resolved_gotchas.prevention: Always use Python-side sort for nested fields to avoid composite index requirements

resolved_gotchas.description: Gemini Flash model string instability across litellm versions
resolved_gotchas.resolution: Centralized model string as GEMINI_MODEL constant in scripts/utils/ollama_config.py. All litellm callers import from there. v9.44 confirmed gemini/gemini-2.5-flash works with litellm 1.83.3.
resolved_gotchas.prevention: Never hardcode Gemini model string in individual scripts. Always use GEMINI_MODEL from ollama_config.py.
